Off Calendar Mar-10-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-15-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Settlement Conference scheduled from a previously set date is held in Dept.514 with Judge Thomas J. Mellon, Jr., Clerk: Vicki Mack, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189
Appearances:
Plaintiff's counsel, Scott J. Allen, Esq., with Plaintiff Benjamin Dai.
Defendants' counsel, Martin J. Everson, Esq. for Defendants Michael Rabkin, M.D., and California LaserCenters.
Defendant's counsel, Tyler G. Draa for Brian A. Bonanni, M.D.
In open court and on the record, Co-defendants jointly agree to pay $99,999.00 to Plaintiff for a full and complete release and satisfaction of all claims; Plaintiff shall hold all defendants harmless and agrees to a release of all liens, present and future. Plaintiff further agrees to no publicity of any kind concerning the settlement and further agrees to hold the terms of said settlement in confidence. Each party to bear its own costs and attorney fees. Plaintiff agrees to sign a standard release agreement and to file a dismissal of the action. Each counsel for defendants authorized to agree to payment of 50 percent of the total settlement amount. The Court shall retain jurisdiction until the action is dismissed.
